title: Since U Been Gone
why_this_song: Since U Been Gone by Kelly Clarkson (2004) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Since you been gone"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Since you been gone"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Thanks to you"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You're dedicated, you took the time"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I can breathe for the first time"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You're dedicated, you took the time
Wasn't long 'til I called you mine
I can breathe for the first time
I'm so moving on, yeah, yeah
Now I get what I want

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "since" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "since" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gone" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Here's the thing, we started out friends
Since you been gone (since you been gone)

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Since U Been Gone" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Since U Been Gone", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Since U Been Gone" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Since U Been Gone" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Since U Been Gone", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Since U Been Gone", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
